speaker: speaker1
text: How did you find your apartment ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You can check on the bulletin boards at school for local housing .

speaker: speaker1
text: What if I need a roommate ?

speaker: speaker2
text: There are websites that can hook you up with a roommate .

speaker: speaker1
text: How much do apartments cost around here ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It depends on what you want . Do you want a one - or two-bedroom apartment ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I just need a one-bedroom apartment .

speaker: speaker2
text: That will probably cost you around twelve hundred dollars a month .

speaker: speaker1
text: Would you come with me to look at apartments ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I would be happy to look at apartments with you .
